content:
Major Clean Technology & Environment Programs

{/* Sustainable Development Technology Canada */}
Sustainable Development Technology Canada (SDTC)
$2M - $15M
Pre-Commercial
Up to 40%
Canadian Companies

Canada's flagship cleantech commercialization fund providing up to $15M (40% project costs) in non-repayable contributions for pre-commercial clean technology development and demonstration with significant environmental benefits.

SDTC Technology Focus:
  • • Climate Technologies: GHG reduction and mitigation
  • • Clean Air: Air quality improvement solutions
  • • Clean Water: Water quality and conservation technologies
  • • Clean Soil: Soil remediation and protection systems
Project Requirements:
  • • Demonstrated environmental benefits
  • • Strong commercial potential and market validation
  • • Technical feasibility and innovation
  • • Capable management team and partners
Funding Structure:
  • • Average $3M contribution over 5 years
  • • Rolling application intake
  • • Non-repayable funding (no equity taken)
  • • Co-funding partnerships encouraged
{/* Net Zero Accelerator */}
Net Zero Accelerator Initiative
$8B Program
Large-Scale
Net-Zero 2050
Transformative

Federal government's $8 billion flagship program supporting large-scale projects that help achieve Canada's net-zero emissions by 2050, with emphasis on decarbonization and clean technology deployment.

Program Objectives:
  • • Accelerate large-scale decarbonization projects
  • • Transform heavy-emitting industrial sectors
  • • Build Canadian clean technology manufacturing
  • • Create sustainable jobs in clean economy
Priority Sectors:
  • • Steel, cement, aluminum, chemicals manufacturing
  • • Clean electricity generation and storage
  • • Electric vehicle and battery manufacturing
  • • Hydrogen production and infrastructure
{/* Agricultural Clean Technology Program */}
Agricultural Clean Technology Program (ACT)
Up to $2M
Agriculture Focus
50-75% Funding
Farm Operations

$165M program supporting agricultural clean technology adoption and R&D through two streams: technology adoption (50-75% funding) and research innovation for pre-market cleantech development.

Adoption Stream:
  • • Purchase and installation of commercial cleantech
  • • Green energy and energy efficiency systems
  • • Precision agriculture technologies
  • • Bioeconomy solutions and processes
Research & Innovation Stream:
  • • Applied R&D of agricultural clean technologies
  • • Piloting and technology evaluation
  • • Demonstration and knowledge transfer
  • • Commercialization and scale-up activities
Eligible Recipients:
  • • Farm businesses and agri-food processors
  • • Not-for-profit organizations and co-operatives
  • • Indigenous groups and communities
  • • Individuals and sole proprietors (Adoption only)
{/* Clean Growth Program */}
Clean Growth Program
Up to $5M
Early-Stage
Innovation
SMEs

Innovation funding for early-stage clean technology companies developing breakthrough environmental solutions with significant market potential and environmental impact.

Technology Areas:
  • • Advanced energy storage and grid integration
  • • Carbon capture, utilization, and storage
  • • Advanced materials and manufacturing processes
  • • Water treatment and purification technologies
Program Benefits:
  • • Non-dilutive funding preserving equity
  • • Technical and business mentorship support
  • • Access to testing facilities and validation
  • • Connection to investors and strategic partners
{/* Clean Technology Investment Tax Credits */}
Clean Technology Investment Tax Credits
30% Tax Credit
Capital Investment
Refundable
All Industries

Federal refundable tax credit offering up to 30% of capital investments in eligible clean technology equipment and systems, supporting widespread clean technology adoption across all sectors.

Eligible Technologies:
  • • Solar, wind, and hydroelectric generation
  • • Battery energy storage systems
  • • Heat pumps and geothermal systems
  • • Electric vehicle charging equipment
Manufacturing Focus:
  • • Clean technology manufacturing equipment
  • • Processing and refining technologies
  • • Critical mineral extraction and processing
  • • Industrial electrification systems
Credit Structure:
  • • 30% refundable credit on eligible capital
  • • Available for properties acquired after 2023
  • • Labour requirements for certain projects
  • • Stacks with other federal and provincial support
{/* Provincial Clean Technology Programs */}
Provincial Clean Technology Programs
Multi-Program
Regional Focus
Stackable
Provincial Priorities

Comprehensive suite of provincial clean technology programs complementing federal initiatives with region-specific environmental priorities and economic development objectives.

Major Provincial Programs:
  • • CleanBC (BC): Industry Fund and innovation initiatives
  • • Emissions Reduction Alberta: GHG reduction technologies
  • • Ontario Green Commercial Vehicle Program: Fleet electrification
  • • Nova Scotia Clean Economy Grant: Research and development
Regional Specializations:
  • • BC: Clean energy, forest sector innovation
  • • Alberta: CCUS, hydrogen, energy transition
  • • Ontario: Electric vehicles, battery manufacturing
  • • Quebec: Renewable energy, circular economy
shortAnswer: Yes — Complete guide to Canada Funding available: up to $1.2B+.
shortAnswerQuestion: What innovation and technology grants are available in 2026?

faq.question: What is the application deadline for Canada Clean Technology & Environment Grants  | .2B+ Sustainability Funding Programs Guide in 2026?
faq.answer: Deadlines typically vary by specific program tier. However, for 2026, many initiatives operate on a rolling intake basis until funds are depleted. Check the official portal for specific cutoffs.

faq.question: How much funding can I get through Canada Clean Technology & Environment Grants  | .2B+ Sustainability Funding Programs Guide?
faq.answer: Funding amounts range depending on business size and scope. Top awards can reach $1.

faq.question: Do I have to give up equity for this program?
faq.answer: No. Government grants and subsidies are non-dilutive, meaning you retain 100% ownership of your company.

expertTip.title: Claim the ITC Investment Tax Credit
expertTip.content: The new Clean Technology Investment Tax Credit (ITC) offers a refundable 30% credit on capital costs. This is distinct from grants and can be claimed on your tax return.
